mapper.sql: id, client_id, user_name, password, app_id, auth_mode, encrypt_key, encrypt_vector, sign_key, encrypt_method, device_identification, device_name, connector, description, device_status, connect_status, device_tags, product_identification, sw_version, fw_version, device_sdk_version, gateway_id, node_type, remark, deleted, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by, created_org_id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalDevicesCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN device_status = 0 THEN 1 END) AS notActivatedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN device_status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS activatedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN device_status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS lockedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN connect_status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS offlineCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN connect_status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS onlineCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN connect_status = 0 THEN 1 END) AS notConnectedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN node_type = 1 THEN 1 END) AS gatewayDeviceCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN node_type = 0 THEN 1 END) AS ordinaryCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN node_type = 2 THEN 1 END) AS subDeviceCount FROM device WHERE
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT product_identification, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sw_version IS NOT NULL AND sw_version != '' THEN sw_version END) AS sw_versions, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fw_version IS NOT NULL AND fw_version != '' THEN fw_version END) AS fw_versions FROM device WHERE product_identification = #{productIdentification} AND
GROUP BY product_identification
